payload.answer: No article content could be extracted because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The source article content was not available due to the fetch failure, so no durable article entity or content-specific resolution can be established.

payload.intent: Attempted article memory extraction from a URL fetch failure with a 404 network error.

memory_cards.statement: The attempted fetch for the article at https -//examplecom/missing returned a 404 network error.

details: No content-based memory cards were extracted.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL after correcting the URL formatting.
Provide the article text directly for extraction.
